verdict: An incredibly repetitive, copy-pasted chart that completely ignores song structure, offering the exact same 8-step pattern from start to finish.

issues.problem: Total lack of structural contrast. The intro, drop, and outro are mapped with identical note density, making the drop feel completely flat.
Rigid 8-note lane loop (BAR, GAP, NOTE, GAP, BAR, NOTE, GAP, NOTE) is copy-pasted verbatim five times, failing to follow any actual melodic movement or percussion shifts.
Zero use of hold notes. Synthwave tracks rely heavily on sustained synthesizer lines, which are left completely unmapped here.
